name: YRIF Chat
description: YRIF Chat — bilingual (Swahili + English) assistant for the Youth Research & Innovation Foundation platform (yriftz.org). Bot ID: 6732.

actions.text:
🇹🇿 Karibu sana kwenye YRIF Chat! 🌟 Mimi ni msaidizi wako wa kidijitali wa Youth Research & Innovation Foundation.

Ninaweza kukusaidia kuhusu:
📝 Utafiti & Mawasilisho
📅 Matukio & Mashindano
🤝 Ushauri wa Kitaaluma
🏆 Vyeti & Tuzo
💰 Ruzuku & Ufadhili
💼 Nafasi za Kazi & Volunteering
📚 Rasilimali za Kujifunzia

Ungehitaji msaada gani leo?

---
🇬🇧 Welcome to YRIF Chat! 🌟 I'm your digital assistant for the Youth Research & Innovation Foundation.

I can help you with:
📝 Research & Submissions
📅 Events & Competitions
🤝 Mentorship & Guidance
🏆 Certificates & Awards
💰 Grants & Funding
💼 Vacancies & Volunteering
📚 Learning Resources

What can I help you with today?

🇹🇿 *YRIF — Youth Research & Innovation Foundation* ni taasisi ya kitaifa ya Tanzania. 🇹🇿

🎯 *Dhamira:* Kuleta nguvu kwa vijana wa Tanzania kupitia utafiti, uvumbuzi, na teknolojia ili kushughulikia changamoto za kimataifa.

👥 *Tunakusanyisha:*
• Vijana na Watafiti
• Washauri wa Kitaaluma
• Washirika wa Sekta Binafsi
• Wasaidizi wa Utafiti
• Wanafunzi wa Shule za Sekondari na Vyuo Vikuu

🏆 *Tunafanya nini:*
• Kusaidia mawasilisho ya utafiti wa kisayansi
• Kupanga mashindano ya uvumbuzi (Youth Bonanza)
• Kuunganisha vijana na washauri wenye uzoefu
• Kutoa ruzuku na fursa za ufadhili
• Kujenga mtandao wa kitaifa wa vijana wabunifu

📊 *Malengo:* Wanachama 3,000+ mwaka wa kwanza, vyuo vikuu 20+, shule 30+

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF — Youth Research & Innovation Foundation* is Tanzania's national youth research platform. 🇹🇿

🎯 *Mission:* To engage the youth potential by addressing global challenges through research-based solutions.

👥 *We bring together:*
• Youth and Researchers
• Academic Mentors & Advisors
• Private Sector Partners
• Research Assistants
• Secondary school and university students

🏆 *What we do:*
• Support academic research submissions
• Organise innovation competitions (Youth Bonanza)
• Connect youth with experienced mentors
• Provide grants and funding opportunities
• Build a nationwide network of innovative youth

📊 *Scale targets:* 3,000+ members yr-1, 20+ universities, 30+ high schools

🇹🇿 *Maono na Dhamira ya YRIF:*

🔭 *Maono:* "Kuwa kituo cha dunia cha Utafiti na Uvumbuzi"

🎯 *Dhamira:* "Kuleta nguvu kwa vijana kupitia kushughulikia changamoto za kimataifa kupitia ufumbuzi unaotegemea utafiti"

🌍 *Mwelekeo:*
• Tanzania Vision 2050
• Ajenda ya Kitaifa ya Utafiti
• Malengo ya Maendeleo Endelevu (SDGs): 4, 8, 9

YRIF inajitahidi kujenga kizazi kipya cha watafiti na wabunifu watakaosaidia Tanzania na dunia nzima.

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Vision & Mission:*

🔭 *Vision:* "To become the world's centre of Research and Innovation"

🎯 *Mission:* "To engage the youth potential by addressing global challenges through research-based solutions"

🌍 *Aligned with:*
• Tanzania Vision 2050
• National Research Agenda
• Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs): 4, 8, 9

YRIF strives to build a new generation of researchers and innovators who will contribute to Tanzania and the world.

🇹🇿 *Maadili Msingi ya YRIF:*

✨ *Utaalamu (Professionalism)* — Tunafanya kazi kwa ubora wa hali ya juu na uwajibikaji katika kila tunalofanya.

🔒 *Uaminifu (Integrity)* — Tunashikamana na ukweli, uwazi, na maadili ya kitaaluma daima.

📌 *Uzingatifu (Adherence)* — Tunafuata viwango, michakato, na ahadi zetu kwa uthabiti.

💡 *Uvumbuzi (Innovation)* — Tunahimiza fikira mpya, suluhisho za ubunifu, na njia za kisasa za kushughulikia matatizo.

Maadili haya yanaongoza kila mwanachama, mshauri, na mshirika wa YRIF.

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Core Values:*

✨ *Professionalism* — We operate with the highest standards of quality and accountability in all we do.

🔒 *Integrity* — We uphold truth, transparency, and ethical conduct at all times.

📌 *Adherence* — We consistently follow standards, processes, and our commitments.

💡 *Innovation* — We encourage new ideas, creative solutions, and modern approaches to problem-solving.

These values guide every member, mentor, and partner of YRIF.

🇹🇿 *Nani Anaweza Kujiunga na YRIF?* 🎉

YRIF inakaribishia kila mtu anayependa utafiti na uvumbuzi!

👤 *Aina za Watumiaji:*
🧑‍🎓 *Kijana* — Wadau wanaotaka kujifunza, kushiriki, na kukua
🔬 *Mtafiti* — Wanaofanya utafiti wa kitaaluma au wa kisayansi
👨‍💼 *Mshauri* — Wataalamu wanaotaka kusaidia vijana kukua
🏢 *Mshirika wa Sekta Binafsi* — Makampuni yanayotaka kushirikiana
🛠️ *Msaidizi wa Utafiti* — Wanaotaka kusaidia miradi ya utafiti

📋 *Mahitaji:*
• Umri wowote (mwanafunzi wa sekondari hadi mtu mzima)
• Nia ya kujifunza na kuchangia
• Akaunti ya barua pepe au nambari ya simu ya Tanzania

Jisajili bure na usubiri idhini ya akaunti yako (siku 1-2 za kazi)!

---
🇬🇧 *Who Can Join YRIF?* 🎉

YRIF welcomes everyone who is passionate about research and innovation!

👤 *User Types:*
🧑‍🎓 *Youth* — Members who want to learn, participate, and grow
🔬 *Researcher* — Those doing academic or scientific research
👨‍💼 *Mentor/Advisor* — Experienced professionals wanting to guide youth
🏢 *Private Sector Partner* — Companies wanting to collaborate
🛠️ *Research Assistant* — Those wanting to support research projects

📋 *Requirements:*
• Any age (secondary school student to professional)
• Willingness to learn and contribute
• Email account or Tanzanian phone number

Register for free and wait for account approval (1-2 business days)!

🇹🇿 *Jinsi ya Kusajili Akaunti ya YRIF:*

1️⃣ Nenda yriftz.org na bonyeza *Register / Jisajili*
2️⃣ Chagua njia ya kusajili:
   • 📱 BRIQ Auth — nambari ya simu ya Tanzania (OTP)
   • 📧 Google — Gmail yako
3️⃣ Jaza taarifa zako za kibinafsi
4️⃣ Thibitisha barua pepe au nambari yako
5️⃣ Kamisha wasifu wako (elimu, maslahi, ujuzi)
6️⃣ Subiri idhini ya akaunti (siku 1-2 za kazi)

✉️ Utapata arifa ukisha kuidhinishwa na utaweza kutumia jukwaa lote.

---
🇬🇧 *How to Register a YRIF Account:*

1️⃣ Go to yriftz.org and click *Register / Sign Up*
2️⃣ Choose your registration method:
   • 📱 BRIQ Auth — Tanzanian phone number (OTP)
   • 📧 Google — your Gmail account
3️⃣ Fill in your personal details
4️⃣ Verify your email or phone number
5️⃣ Complete your profile (education, interests, skills)
6️⃣ Wait for account approval (1-2 business days)

✉️ You'll receive a notification once approved and will have full access to the platform.

🇹🇿 *Msaada wa Akaunti:*

Tuna njia mbili za kuingia kwenye YRIF:
📱 *BRIQ Auth* — Nambari ya simu ya Tanzania (OTP)
🌐 *Google* — Gmail yako

*Matatizo ya kawaida:*
• Nenosiri limesahauliwa → Bonyeza Forgot Password
• Barua pepe haithibitishwa → Angalia kisanduku cha spam
• OTP haijafika → Jaribu tena baada ya dakika 1
• Akaunti imefungwa → Wasiliana nasi

Bado una tatizo? Wasiliana nasi: info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *Account Help:*

YRIF supports two login methods:
📱 *BRIQ Auth* — Tanzanian phone number (OTP)
🌐 *Google* — your Gmail account

*Common issues:*
• Forgotten password → Click Forgot Password
• Email not verified → Check your spam folder
• OTP not received → Try again after 1 minute
• Account suspended → Contact us

Still having trouble? Contact us: info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Mchakato wa Idhini ya Akaunti:*

Kila akaunti mpya inakaguliwa na timu yetu ili kuhakikisha usalama wa jamii yetu.

⏱️ *Muda:* Kawaida siku 1-2 za kazi

📬 *Utapata arifa kwa barua pepe:*
• ✅ Akaunti imeidhinishwa — unaweza kuanza kutumia jukwaa
• ❌ Ombi limekataliwa — pamoja na sababu
• 🚫 Akaunti imesimamishwa — pamoja na maelezo

*Hali za akaunti:*
• ⏳ Inasubiri idhini (Pending Approval)
• ✅ Amilifu (Active)
• 🚫 Imesimamishwa (Suspended)
• ❌ Imekataliwa (Rejected)

Ukingoja zaidi ya siku 3 bila jibu, wasiliana nasi moja kwa moja:
📧 info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *Account Approval Process:*

Every new account is reviewed by our team to ensure community safety.

⏱️ *Timeline:* Usually 1-2 business days

📬 *You'll receive an email notification:*
• ✅ Account approved — you can start using the platform
• ❌ Request rejected — with reasons provided
• 🚫 Account suspended — with explanation

*Account statuses:*
• ⏳ Pending Approval
• ✅ Active
• 🚫 Suspended
• ❌ Rejected

If you've been waiting more than 3 days without a response, contact us directly:
📧 info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Msaada wa Nenosiri:*

*Umesahau Nenosiri?*
1️⃣ Nenda ukurasa wa kuingia (Login)
2️⃣ Bonyeza *Forgot Password / Nilikuwa Nenosiri*
3️⃣ Weka barua pepe yako
4️⃣ Angalia barua pepe kwa kiungo cha kuanzisha upya nenosiri
5️⃣ Bonyeza kiungo na weka nenosiri jipya

*Kubadilisha Nenosiri (ukiwa umeingia):*
1️⃣ Nenda Profile → Security
2️⃣ Weka nenosiri la sasa
3️⃣ Weka nenosiri jipya mara mbili
4️⃣ Bonyeza Save

Nenosiri bora liwe na herufi kubwa, ndogo, nambari, na alama.
Bado una tatizo? info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *Password Help:*

*Forgot Your Password?*
1️⃣ Go to the Login page
2️⃣ Click *Forgot Password*
3️⃣ Enter your email address
4️⃣ Check your email for a password reset link
5️⃣ Click the link and set a new password

*Change Password (when logged in):*
1️⃣ Go to Profile → Security
2️⃣ Enter your current password
3️⃣ Enter your new password twice
4️⃣ Click Save

A strong password includes uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
Still stuck? info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Kusasisha Wasifu Wako:*

Ingia kwenye akaunti yako na nenda *Profile* ili kusasisha:

📝 *Taarifa za Kibinafsi:*
• Jina la kwanza na la familia
• Maelezo yako (Bio)
• Picha ya wasifu
• Mkoa na taasisi

📚 *Kielimu & Utaalamu:*
• Kiwango cha elimu (Sekondari / Chuo / Uzamili / PhD)
• Maslahi ya utafiti
• Ujuzi na mafanikio

📱 *Mawasiliano:*
• Nambari ya simu (thibitisha kwa OTP)
• Mtandao wa kijamii (hiari)

💡 Wasifu kamili unakusaidia kupata ushauri unaofaa, matukio, na fursa za ufadhili!

---
🇬🇧 *Updating Your Profile:*

Log in and go to *Profile* to update:

📝 *Personal Information:*
• First and last name
• Bio / personal description
• Profile picture
• Region and institution

📚 *Education & Expertise:*
• Education level (Secondary / Degree / Masters / PhD)
• Research interests
• Skills and achievements

📱 *Contact:*
• Phone number (verified via OTP)
• Social media links (optional)

💡 A complete profile helps you get matched with the right mentors, events, and funding opportunities!

🇹🇿 *Majukumu kwenye YRIF:*

🧑‍🎓 *Kijana (Youth)* — Mwanachama wa kawaida: jifunza, shiriki matukio, omba ushauri
🔬 *Mtafiti (Researcher)* — Wasilisha na usimamie utafiti wa kitaaluma
👨‍💼 *Mshauri (Mentor/Advisor)* — Toa ushauri na ongoza vijana
🛠️ *Msaidizi wa Utafiti (Research Assistant)* — Saidia miradi ya utafiti
🏢 *Mshirika wa Sekta Binafsi (Private Sector Partner)* — Ushirikiano wa biashara na ufadhili
⚖️ *Hakimu (Judge)* — Kadiria utafiti na miradi ya mashindano
👑 *Msimamizi (Admin)* — Usimamizi wa jukwaa

Kubadilisha jukumu lako: Wasiliana nasi kwa info@yriftz.org au nenda Profile na omba mabadiliko.

---
🇬🇧 *Roles on YRIF:*

🧑‍🎓 *Youth* — Regular member: learn, join events, request mentorship
🔬 *Researcher* — Submit and manage academic research
👨‍💼 *Mentor/Advisor* — Guide and advise youth members
🛠️ *Research Assistant* — Support research projects
🏢 *Private Sector Partner* — Business collaboration and funding
⚖️ *Judge* — Evaluate research and competition projects
👑 *Admin* — Platform management

To change your role: Contact us at info@yriftz.org or go to your Profile and request a role change.

🇹🇿 *Jinsi ya Kuwasilisha Utafiti:*

1️⃣ Ingia kwenye akaunti yako
2️⃣ Nenda *Research → Submit Research*
3️⃣ Jaza taarifa za utafiti:
   • Kichwa cha utafiti
   • Muhtasari (Abstract)
   • Maneno muhimu (Keywords)
4️⃣ Chagua kategoria (Sayansi za Asili / Sayansi za Jamii / Sanaa / Teknolojia)
5️⃣ Pakia hati yako (PDF au Word)
6️⃣ Bonyeza *Submit / Wasilisha*

⏳ Utafiti wako utakaguliwa na wataalamu. Utapata arifa baada ya ukaguzi!

💡 Kumbuka: Utafiti wote lazima uwe wa asili (original) na usifanane na kazi zilizopita.

---
🇬🇧 *How to Submit Research:*

1️⃣ Log in to your account
2️⃣ Go to *Research → Submit Research*
3️⃣ Fill in the research details:
   • Research title
   • Abstract / Summary
   • Keywords
4️⃣ Select category (Natural Sciences / Social Sciences / Arts / Technology)
5️⃣ Upload your document (PDF or Word)
6️⃣ Click *Submit*

⏳ Your research will be reviewed by our expert panel. You'll receive a notification after review!

💡 Note: All research must be original and must not duplicate previous work.

🇹🇿 *Kufuatilia Utafiti Wako:*

Ingia kwenye akaunti yako na nenda *Research → My Submissions*

📊 *Hali za Utafiti:*
✏️ *Rasimu (Draft)* — Bado hujatuma
📤 *Imetumwa (Submitted)* — Inasubiri ukaguzi
🔍 *Inakaguliwa (Under Review)* — Wataalamu wanakagua
✅ *Imeidhinishwa (Approved)* — Imepitishwa!
❌ *Imekataliwa (Rejected)* — Tazama maoni ya wataalamu na urekebisha
🌐 *Imechapishwa (Published)* — Inaonekana kwa umma

📧 Utapata arifa kwa barua pepe kwa kila mabadiliko ya hali.

Kama una maswali mahususi kuhusu utafiti wako: info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *Tracking Your Research Status:*

Log in and go to *Research → My Submissions*

📊 *Research Statuses:*
✏️ *Draft* — Not yet submitted
📤 *Submitted* — Awaiting review
🔍 *Under Review* — Experts are evaluating
✅ *Approved* — Accepted!
❌ *Rejected* — Review expert feedback and revise
🌐 *Published* — Visible to the public

📧 You'll receive email notifications for every status change.

For specific questions about your research: info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Kategoria za Utafiti katika YRIF:*

🔬 *Sayansi za Asili (Natural Sciences)*
   Biolojia, Kemia, Fizikia, Mazingira, Afya, Kilimo

👥 *Sayansi za Jamii (Social Sciences)*
   Uchumi, Saikolojia, Siasa, Elimu, Sosholojia

🎨 *Sanaa (Arts)*
   Sanaa za ubunifu, Utamaduni, Lugha, Historia, Falsafa

💻 *Teknolojia (Technology)*
   TEHAMA, Uhandisi, Programu za Kompyuta, Uvumbuzi wa Kidijitali, AI

🏆 *Tuzo za Kila Mwaka (Annual Awards):*
• Sayansi za Asili
• Sayansi za Jamii
• Sanaa

Chagua kategoria inayofaa utafiti wako zaidi!

---
🇬🇧 *Research Categories at YRIF:*

🔬 *Natural Sciences*
   Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Environment, Health, Agriculture

👥 *Social Sciences*
   Economics, Psychology, Political Science, Education, Sociology

🎨 *Arts*
   Creative Arts, Culture, Language, History, Philosophy

💻 *Technology*
   ICT, Engineering, Computer Science, Digital Innovation, AI

🏆 *Annual Awards categories:*
• Natural Sciences
• Social Sciences
• Arts

Select the category that best fits your research!

🇹🇿 *Matukio ya YRIF:*

🎓 *Seminari* — Mazungumzo ya kitaalamu na wataalamu
🛠️ *Warsha (Workshops)* — Mafunzo ya vitendo na ujuzi
🏆 *Mashindano* — Shindana na ushinde tuzo za pesa na vyeti
🎪 *Youth Bonanza* — Onyesha mradi wako mbele ya umma
💻 *Webinari* — Matukio ya mtandaoni (online)
🎖️ *Tuzo za Kila Mwaka (Annual Awards)* — Utambuzi wa utafiti bora
🏫 *Mipango ya Shule* — Warsha za shule za sekondari na vyuo vikuu

Tembelea ukurasa wa *Events* kwenye jukwaa letu kuona matukio yanayokuja na kusajili!

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Events:*

🎓 *Seminars* — Academic talks with experts
🛠️ *Workshops* — Hands-on skills training
🏆 *Competitions* — Compete and win cash prizes and certificates
🎪 *Youth Bonanza* — Showcase your project to the public
💻 *Webinars* — Online events you can join from anywhere
🎖️ *Annual Awards* — Recognition of outstanding research
🏫 *School Programs* — Workshops at secondary schools and universities

Visit the *Events* page on our platform to see upcoming events and register!

🇹🇿 *Jinsi ya Kusajili Tukio:*

1️⃣ Ingia kwenye akaunti yako
2️⃣ Nenda ukurasa wa *Events*
3️⃣ Bonyeza tukio unalotaka
4️⃣ Angalia tarehe, mahali (au kiungo cha mkutano wa mtandaoni), na mahitaji
5️⃣ Bonyeza *Register Now / Jisajili*
6️⃣ Utapata uthibitisho kwa barua pepe!

📌 *Kumbuka:*
• Baadhi ya matukio yanahitaji mawasilisho ya utafiti kwa mashindano
• Hakikisha kusajili kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho
• Baadhi ya matukio ni ya bure, mengine yana ada ndogo

---
🇬🇧 *How to Register for an Event:*

1️⃣ Log in to your account
2️⃣ Go to the *Events* page
3️⃣ Click on the event you want to attend
4️⃣ Review the date, location (or online meeting link), and requirements
5️⃣ Click *Register Now*
6️⃣ You'll receive a confirmation by email!

📌 *Note:*
• Some events require a research submission for competitions
• Ensure you register before the deadline
• Some events are free, others may have a small fee

🇹🇿 *Matukio Yako:*

Ingia kwenye akaunti yako na nenda *Events → My Registrations* kuona:

• ✅ Matukio uliyosajili
• 📋 Hali ya usajili wako
• 📅 Matukio yanayokuja
• 🏆 Matokeo ya mashindano
• 📜 Vyeti vyako vya ushiriki

Kama hujasajili tukio lolote bado, tembelea ukurasa wa Events uone kinachofuata!

---
🇬🇧 *Your Events:*

Log in and go to *Events → My Registrations* to see:

• ✅ Events you've registered for
• 📋 Your registration status
• 📅 Upcoming events
• 🏆 Competition results
• 📜 Your participation certificates

If you haven't registered for any events yet, visit the Events page to see what's coming up!

🇹🇿 *Mashindano ya YRIF:*

Mashindano yetu yanalenga kuleta uvumbuzi wa vijana mbele ya wataalamu na umma!

🎪 *Youth Bonanza* — Onyesha mradi wako au uvumbuzi wako
🎖️ *Tuzo za Kila Mwaka* — Utafiti bora katika Sayansi za Asili, Sayansi za Jamii, na Sanaa

📝 *Jinsi ya Kushiriki:*
1. Wasilisha utafiti au mradi wako kupitia jukwaa
2. Sajili kwa tukio la mashindano
3. Wataalamu (majaji) watakadiria kazi zako
4. Bora wanapata tuzo!

🎖️ *Tuzo:*
• Vyeti vya ushindi
• Zawadi za pesa (cash prizes)
• Nafasi za mafunzo na internship
• Mtandao wa kitaalamu

Tazama matukio ya mashindano kwenye ukurasa wa Events!

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Competitions:*

Our competitions bring youth innovation before experts and the public!

🎪 *Youth Bonanza* — Showcase your project or innovation
🎖️ *Annual Awards* — Best research in Natural Sciences, Social Sciences, and Arts

📝 *How to Participate:*
1. Submit your research or project through the platform
2. Register for the competition event
3. Expert judges will evaluate your work
4. Top performers receive prizes!

🎖️ *Prizes:*
• Winner's certificates
• Cash prizes
• Training and internship opportunities
• Professional networking

Check the Events page for upcoming competitions!

🇹🇿 *Vyeti vya YRIF:*

Unaweza kupata aina mbili za vyeti:
🥇 *Hati ya Ushindi* — Ukishinda mashindano
📜 *Hati ya Ushiriki* — Ukishiriki matukio

*Jinsi ya Kupakua Hati Yako:*
1️⃣ Ingia kwenye akaunti yako
2️⃣ Nenda *Events → My Registrations*
3️⃣ Bonyeza tukio husika
4️⃣ Bonyeza *Download Certificate / Pakua Hati*

⏳ Vyeti vinapatikana baada ya tukio kukamilika na matokeo kuthibitishwa.

Kama hati yako haipo baada ya siku 3 za tukio, wasiliana nasi:
📧 info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Certificates:*

You can receive two types of certificates:
🥇 *Winner's Certificate* — When you win a competition
📜 *Participation Certificate* — When you attend an event

*How to Download Your Certificate:*
1️⃣ Log in to your account
2️⃣ Go to *Events → My Registrations*
3️⃣ Click on the relevant event
4️⃣ Click *Download Certificate*

⏳ Certificates are available after the event is completed and results are confirmed.

If your certificate isn't available after 3 days, contact us:
📧 info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Programu ya Ushauri wa YRIF:*

Tunaunganisha vijana wenye talanta na wataalamu wenye uzoefu!

*Mchakato wa Ushauri:*
1. 📋 Jaza ombi la ushauri (Mentorship Request)
2. 🔍 Timu yetu inakupanga na mshauri anayefaa
3. 🤝 Mazungumzo na mshauri wako yanaanza
4. 📈 Fuatilia maendeleo yako kwenye jukwaa

👨‍💼 *Washauri wetu wana uzoefu katika:*
• Sayansi na Teknolojia (STEM)
• Biashara na Ujasiriamali
• Sanaa na Ubunifu
• Sera na Uongozi
• Utafiti wa Kitaaluma

Omba mshauri leo kupitia ukurasa wa *Mentorship*!

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Mentorship Program:*

We connect talented youth with experienced professionals!

*Mentorship Process:*
1. 📋 Fill in a Mentorship Request
2. 🔍 Our team matches you with a suitable mentor
3. 🤝 Sessions with your mentor begin
4. 📈 Track your progress on the platform

👨‍💼 *Our mentors have expertise in:*
• Science and Technology (STEM)
• Business and Entrepreneurship
• Arts and Creativity
• Policy and Leadership
• Academic Research

Request a mentor today via the *Mentorship* page!

🇹🇿 *Jinsi ya Kuomba Mshauri:*

1️⃣ Ingia kwenye akaunti yako
2️⃣ Nenda ukurasa wa *Mentorship*
3️⃣ Bonyeza *Request Mentor / Omba Mshauri*
4️⃣ Jaza fomu:
   • Mada unayohitaji ushauri
   • Ujumbe kwa mshauri wanaotarajiwa
   • Mshauri unayependekeza (si lazima)
5️⃣ Tuma ombi

⏳ Timu yetu itakupanga na mshauri ndani ya siku *3-5 za kazi*.
Utapata arifa kwa barua pepe ukishapangwa!

💡 Ushauri ni wa bure kwa wanachama wote wa YRIF.

---
🇬🇧 *How to Request a Mentor:*

1️⃣ Log in to your account
2️⃣ Go to the *Mentorship* page
3️⃣ Click *Request Mentor*
4️⃣ Fill in the form:
   • Topic you need guidance on
   • Message to the prospective mentor
   • Preferred mentor (optional)
5️⃣ Submit the request

⏳ Our team will match you with a mentor within *3-5 business days*.
You'll receive an email notification once matched!

💡 Mentorship is free for all YRIF members.

🇹🇿 *Kuwa Mshauri wa YRIF:* 🌟

Kama una uzoefu na unataka kusaidia vijana wa Tanzania kukua, tunakukaribishia!

📋 *Mahitaji ya Mshauri:*
• Uzoefu wa kitaaluma, kitaaluma, au ubunifu (miaka 3+)
• Nia ya kweli ya kusaidia vijana
• Muda wa dakika 30-60 kwa wiki

*Jinsi ya Kusajili kama Mshauri:*
1️⃣ Ingia kwenye akaunti yako
2️⃣ Nenda *Profile → Mentor Profile*
3️⃣ Jaza maelezo ya utaalamu na uzoefu wako
4️⃣ Weka upatikanaji wako (availability)
5️⃣ Timu yetu itakukagua na kukuimarisha ndani ya siku 3-5

Asante kwa kutaka kusaidia vijana wa Tanzania! 🇹🇿

---
🇬🇧 *Become a YRIF Mentor:* 🌟

If you have experience and want to help Tanzanian youth grow, we welcome you!

📋 *Mentor Requirements:*
• Professional, academic, or creative experience (3+ years)
• Genuine desire to help youth
• 30-60 minutes available per week

*How to Register as a Mentor:*
1️⃣ Log in to your account
2️⃣ Go to *Profile → Mentor Profile*
3️⃣ Fill in your expertise and experience details
4️⃣ Set your availability
5️⃣ Our team will review and approve you within 3-5 days

Thank you for wanting to help Tanzanian youth! 🇹🇿

🇹🇿 *Ushauri Wako:*

Ingia kwenye akaunti yako na nenda *Mentorship → My Mentorship* kuona:

• 📋 Hali ya ombi lako
• 👤 Maelezo ya mshauri wako
• 💬 Historia ya mazungumzo ya ushauri
• 📊 Maendeleo ya vikao
• ⭐ Toa maoni (feedback) kuhusu ushauri

Kama una tatizo na ushauri wako au unataka kubadilisha mshauri, wasiliana na timu yetu:
📧 info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *Your Mentorship:*

Log in and go to *Mentorship → My Mentorship* to see:

• 📋 Status of your mentorship request
• 👤 Your mentor's profile and contact details
• 💬 Mentorship session history
• 📊 Progress tracking
• ⭐ Leave feedback about your mentorship experience

If you have an issue with your mentorship or want to change mentors, contact our team:
📧 info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Ushirikiano na YRIF:* 🏢

Tunafurahi kushirikiana na makampuni, taasisi za elimu, na mashirika ya serikali!

🎯 *Faida za Ushirikiano:*
• Fikia talanta za vijana wa Tanzania zaidi ya 3,000
• Pata utafiti wa kisasa unaoshughulikia changamoto halisi
• Jenga jina la kampuni yako kama kiongozi wa maendeleo
• Saidia maendeleo endelevu ya Tanzania

🤝 *Aina za Ushirikiano:*
• 🏭 Sekta ya Viwanda — Ufadhili wa utafiti, ajira kwa wahitimu
• 🏢 Mashirika ya Jamii (NGOs) — Miradi ya pamoja
• 🏫 Taasisi za Elimu — Mipango ya Taaluma
• 🏛️ Serikali — Mipango ya Sera na Utafiti

Wasiliana nasi ili tujadili jinsi ya kushirikiana: info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *Partnership with YRIF:* 🏢

We welcome partnerships with companies, educational institutions, and government agencies!

🎯 *Benefits of Partnership:*
• Access to 3,000+ talented Tanzanian youth
• Get cutting-edge research addressing real challenges
• Build your brand as a development leader
• Contribute to Tanzania's sustainable development

🤝 *Types of Partnership:*
• 🏭 Industry — Research funding, graduate employment
• 🏢 NGOs — Joint development projects
• 🏫 Educational Institutions — Academic programs
• 🏛️ Government — Policy and research programs

Contact us to discuss collaboration: info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Kituo cha Rasilimali cha YRIF:* 📚

Pata nyenzo za kujifunzia na rasilimali muhimu za utafiti!

📄 *Makala na Vitabu* — Machapisho ya kisayansi na kiakademia
🎥 *Video za Mafunzo* — Mafunzo ya jinsi ya kufanya utafiti
📊 *Ripoti za Utafiti* — Tafiti zilizochapishwa na wanachama
📋 *Miongozo na Violezo* — Fomu za utafiti na mwongozo wa uandishi
🎓 *Nyenzo za Mashindano* — Maandalizi ya mashindano

*Jinsi ya Kupata Rasilimali:*
1️⃣ Ingia kwenye akaunti yako
2️⃣ Nenda ukurasa wa *Resources*
3️⃣ Tafuta au vinjari kwa kategoria
4️⃣ Bonyeza *Download / Pakua*

Rasilimali zetu zinaendelea kuongezwa kila wiki!

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Resource Centre:* 📚

Access learning materials and important research resources!

📄 *Articles & Books* — Scientific and academic publications
🎥 *Training Videos* — Tutorials on how to conduct research
📊 *Research Reports* — Published work by our members
📋 *Templates & Guides* — Research forms and writing guides
🎓 *Competition Materials* — Preparation resources for competitions

*How to Access Resources:*
1️⃣ Log in to your account
2️⃣ Go to the *Resources* page
3️⃣ Search or browse by category
4️⃣ Click *Download*

New resources are added every week!

🇹🇿 *Kuchangia YRIF:* 💰

Asante kwa kutaka kuunga mkono kazi yetu ya kuendeleza vijana wa Tanzania!

🌍 *Kwa nini Kuchangia?*
Mchangiaji wako unasaidia:
• Kutoa ruzuku kwa watafiti vijana
• Kupanga mashindano na matukio
• Kuendeleza rasilimali za kujifunzia
• Kufikia vijana zaidi kote Tanzania

💳 *Jinsi ya Kuchangia:*
Wasiliana nasi kupitia barua pepe ili kupata maelezo kamili ya jinsi ya kutoa michango:
📧 info@yriftz.org

Tuna heshima na shukrani kwa kila mchangiaji, mkubwa au mdogo! 🙏

---
🇬🇧 *Donate to YRIF:* 💰

Thank you for wanting to support our work in developing Tanzania's youth!

🌍 *Why Donate?*
Your contribution helps:
• Provide grants to young researchers
• Organise competitions and events
• Develop learning resources
• Reach more youth across Tanzania

💳 *How to Donate:*
Contact us by email to get full details on how to contribute:
📧 info@yriftz.org

We appreciate and honour every contributor, big or small! 🙏

🇹🇿 *Nafasi za Kazi na Volunteering katika YRIF:* 💼

YRIF inakua na tunatafuta watu wenye nguvu na nia!

👔 *Aina za Nafasi:*
• 💼 *Kazi za Muda Kamili* — Katika sekta ya usimamizi na teknolojia
• 🎓 *Internship* — Kwa wanafunzi wa chuo wanaotaka uzoefu
• 🤝 *Volunteering / Kujitoa* — Saidia mashindano, matukio, na programu
• 🔬 *Msaidizi wa Utafiti* — Saidia miradi ya utafiti ya YRIF

📋 *Jinsi ya Kuomba:*
Angalia nafasi zilizopo au tuma CV yako kupitia:
📧 info@yriftz.org
Mada: "Job/Internship/Volunteer Application - [Jina lako]"

Tunashukuru nia yako ya kutaka kuchangia kukua kwa YRIF! 🇹🇿

---
🇬🇧 *Vacancies & Volunteering at YRIF:* 💼

YRIF is growing and we are looking for passionate and dedicated people!

👔 *Types of Opportunities:*
• 💼 *Full-time Jobs* — In administration and technology
• 🎓 *Internships* — For university students seeking experience
• 🤝 *Volunteering* — Help with competitions, events, and programs
• 🔬 *Research Assistant* — Support YRIF research projects

📋 *How to Apply:*
Check available positions or send your CV through:
📧 info@yriftz.org
Subject: "Job/Internship/Volunteer Application - [Your Name]"

We appreciate your interest in contributing to YRIF's growth! 🇹🇿

🇹🇿 *Jarida la YRIF (YRIF Journal):* 📖

YRIF inaunga mkono uchapishaji wa utafiti wa kisayansi wa vijana wa Tanzania!

📰 *Kuhusu Jarida:*
• Jarida la kisayansi la wazi (Open Access)
• Linachapisha utafiti wa ubora kutoka kwa vijana
• Linakaguliwa na wataalamu (Peer-reviewed)
• Linashughulikia nyanja zote: Sayansi, Teknolojia, Sanaa, Sayansi za Jamii

📝 *Kuchapisha Utafiti Wako:*
1️⃣ Wasilisha utafiti wako kupitia jukwaa (Research → Submit)
2️⃣ Utafiti uliopitishwa unaweza kupendekeza kwa uchapishaji
3️⃣ Timu ya jarida itakukagua na kukuarifu

📧 Maswali kuhusu uchapishaji: info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Journal:* 📖

YRIF supports the publication of scientific research by Tanzanian youth!

📰 *About the Journal:*
• Open Access scientific journal
• Publishes quality research from youth
• Peer-reviewed by academic experts
• Covers all fields: Science, Technology, Arts, Social Sciences

📝 *Publishing Your Research:*
1️⃣ Submit your research through the platform (Research → Submit)
2️⃣ Approved research can be recommended for journal publication
3️⃣ The journal team will review and notify you

📧 Journal publication enquiries: info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Ruzuku na Ufadhili wa YRIF:* 💰

YRIF inasaidia vijana kupata rasilimali za kifedha kwa utafiti wao!

🎯 *Aina za Msaada wa Kifedha:*
• 🏆 *Ruzuku za Mashindano* — Zawadi za pesa kwa washindi wa mashindano
• 📚 *Ruzuku za Utafiti* — Msaada kwa miradi ya utafiti inayohitaji fedha
• 🌍 *Nafasi za Nje* — Habari za udhamini wa masomo na konferensi za kimataifa
• 🤝 *Ufadhili wa Washirika* — Fursa kutoka kwa washirika wa sekta binafsi

📋 *Jinsi ya Kuomba:*
1️⃣ Hakikisha una akaunti iliyoidhinishwa
2️⃣ Tazama matangazo ya ruzuku kwenye jukwaa
3️⃣ Jaza fomu ya ombi ikisema inayohitajika
4️⃣ Wasiliana na timu kwa msaada: info@yriftz.org

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF Grants & Funding:* 💰

YRIF helps youth access financial resources for their research!

🎯 *Types of Financial Support:*
• 🏆 *Competition Grants* — Cash prizes for competition winners
• 📚 *Research Grants* — Support for research projects needing funding
• 🌍 *External Opportunities* — Information on scholarships and international conferences
• 🤝 *Partner Funding* — Opportunities from private sector partners

📋 *How to Apply:*
1️⃣ Ensure you have an approved account
2️⃣ Watch for grant announcements on the platform
3️⃣ Fill in the application form when one is available
4️⃣ Contact the team for assistance: info@yriftz.org

🇹🇿 *Programu ya Shule za Sekondari (YRIF High School Program):* 🏫

YRIF inafanya kazi moja kwa moja na shule za sekondari Tanzania!

🎯 *Programu Zetu za Shule:*
• 🔬 *Klabu za Utafiti (Research Clubs)* — Vilabu vya utafiti vya shuleni (Kidato cha 1-6)
• 🛠️ *Warsha za Uvumbuzi* — Mafunzo ya vitendo kwa wanafunzi
• 🏆 *Youth Bonanza kwa Shule* — Onyesha miradi yako mbele ya wataalamu
• 📚 *Rasilimali za Kujifunzia* — Nyenzo za kisayansi kwa wanafunzi

🎯 *Lengo:* Kufikia shule 30+ kote Tanzania

*Jinsi Shule Yako Inaweza Kushiriki:*
• Mwalimu au mkurugenzi wa shule asiliana nasi
• Tutapanga ziara na warsha shuleni mwenu

📧 Mawasiliano ya shule: info@yriftz.org
Mada: "School Partnership - [Jina la Shule]"

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF High School Program:* 🏫

YRIF works directly with secondary schools across Tanzania!

🎯 *Our School Programs:*
• 🔬 *Research Clubs* — In-school research clubs (Form 1-6)
• 🛠️ *Innovation Workshops* — Hands-on training for students
• 🏆 *Youth Bonanza for Schools* — Showcase your project to experts
• 📚 *Learning Resources* — Scientific materials for students

🎯 *Goal:* Reach 30+ schools across Tanzania

*How Your School Can Join:*
• A teacher or school director contacts us
• We will arrange visits and workshops at your school

📧 School contact: info@yriftz.org
Subject: "School Partnership - [School Name]"

🇹🇿 *Programu ya Vyuo Vikuu (YRIF University Program):* 🎓

YRIF inashirikiana na vyuo vikuu kote Tanzania kuendeleza utafiti wa vijana!

🎯 *Programu Zetu za Chuo:*
• 🎓 *Seminari za Chuo (University Seminars)* — Mazungumzo ya kitaalamu
• 🛠️ *Warsha za Utafiti* — Mafunzo ya mbinu za utafiti
• 🤝 *Mipango ya Pamoja* — Miradi ya utafiti ya pamoja na vyuo
• 📊 *Ushiriki wa Wanafunzi* — Fursa za mashindano na tuzo

🎯 *Lengo:* Kufikia vyuo vikuu 20+ kote Tanzania

*Jinsi ya Kushirikiana:*
• Mwanafunzi: Jiandikishe kwenye YRIF platform na shiriki matukio
• Msimamizi wa chuo au profesa: Wasiliana nasi kupanga programu

📧 Mawasiliano ya chuo: info@yriftz.org
Mada: "University Partnership - [Jina la Chuo]"

---
🇬🇧 *YRIF University Program:* 🎓

YRIF collaborates with universities across Tanzania to advance youth research!

🎯 *Our University Programs:*
• 🎓 *University Seminars* — Academic talks with experts
• 🛠️ *Research Workshops* — Training in research methods
• 🤝 *Joint Programs* — Collaborative research projects with universities
• 📊 *Student Participation* — Competition and award opportunities

🎯 *Goal:* Reach 20+ universities across Tanzania

*How to Get Involved:*
• Student: Register on the YRIF platform and join events
• University administrator or professor: Contact us to arrange programs

📧 University contact: info@yriftz.org
Subject: "University Partnership - [University Name]"

📧 *Barua Pepe:* info@yriftz.org
🌐 *Tovuti:* yriftz.org
📱 *Jukwaa:* Unalitumia sasa hivi!

📋 *Kwa Msaada wa Haraka:*
• Tumia fomu ya *Contact* kwenye jukwaa letu
• Au niambie hapa — nitajaribu kukusaidia!
• Tuma barua pepe moja kwa moja kwa info@yriftz.org

⏰ *Masaa ya Kazi:* Jumatatu–Ijumaa, 08:00–17:00 EAT

🇬🇧 *Contact YRIF:* 📞

📧 *Email:* info@yriftz.org
🌐 *Website:* yriftz.org
📱 *Platform:* You're using it right now!

📋 *For Quick Support:*
• Use the *Contact* form on our platform
• Or ask me here — I'll try to help!

⏰ *Working Hours:* Monday–Friday, 08:00–17:00 EAT

📬 We'll respond within 24 hours on business days.

🇹🇿 *Kuripoti Tatizo la Kiufundi:* 🐛

Asante kwa kutuarifu! Hii inasaidia kuboresha jukwaa letu kwa kila mtu.

*Jinsi ya Kuripoti Tatizo:*
1️⃣ Nenda ukurasa wa *Contact* kwenye jukwaa
2️⃣ Chagua mada: *Technical Issue / Tatizo la Kiufundi*
3️⃣ Eleza tatizo kwa undani (pamoja na hatua zilizotokeza tatizo)
4️⃣ Ambatisha picha ya skrini (screenshot) kama inasaidia
5️⃣ Tuma

Au tuma barua pepe moja kwa moja:
📧 info@yriftz.org
Mada: [Technical Issue] — Maelezo mafupi ya tatizo

Timu yetu ya kiufundi itashughulikia haraka!

---
🇬🇧 *Report a Technical Issue:* 🐛

Thank you for letting us know! This helps us improve the platform for everyone.

*How to Report an Issue:*
1️⃣ Go to the *Contact* page on the platform
2️⃣ Select topic: *Technical Issue*
3️⃣ Describe the problem in detail (include steps that led to the issue)
4️⃣ Attach a screenshot if it helps
5️⃣ Submit

Or email us directly:
📧 info@yriftz.org
Subject: [Technical Issue] — Brief description

Our technical team will handle it promptly!

🇹🇿 *Msaada wa Mtu wa Kweli:* 👨‍💼

Nakuelewa! Ombi lako linahitaji usikivu zaidi wa kibinafsi.

✅ Tuma barua pepe kwa timu yetu moja kwa moja:
📧 info@yriftz.org
Mada: [Urgent/Tatizo Kubwa] — Maelezo mafupi

⏱️ Tutajibu ndani ya masaa 24 siku za kazi.

Asante kwa uvumilivu wako! Tutahakikisha hoja yako inashughulikiwa vizuri. 🙏

---
🇬🇧 *Human Support:* 👨‍💼

I understand! Your request needs more personal attention.

✅ Email our team directly:
📧 info@yriftz.org
Subject: [Urgent/Major Issue] — Brief description

⏱️ We'll respond within 24 hours on business days.

Thank you for your patience! We'll make sure your concern is handled properly. 🙏

🇹🇿 Kwaheri! Asante kwa kutumia YRIF Chat. 👋
Niko hapa ukihitaji msaada zaidi wakati wowote. Endelea kufanya kazi nzuri na kuendeleza uvumbuzi! 🌟🇹🇿

---
🇬🇧 Goodbye! Thank you for using YRIF Chat. 👋
I'm here whenever you need help again. Keep up the great work and keep innovating! 🌟🇹🇿

Niambie chochote kuhusu utafiti, matukio, ushauri, au YRIF kwa ujumla!

---

Feel free to ask me anything about research, events, mentorship, or YRIF in general!

🇹🇿 Samahani, sijaelewea vizuri. Unaweza kuniambia tena kwa maneno mengine?

Ninaweza kukusaidia kuhusu: utafiti, matukio, ushauri, akaunti, ruzuku, nafasi za kazi, au mawasiliano.
